title: Docs + polish: document kb serve; vendored-asset provenance
description:
Finalize: document 'kb serve' in skills/repo-wiki/SKILL.md and a new references/web.md (how to run, what it shows, the stdlib/vendored/localhost/read-only design, the deferred edit epic). Add PROVENANCE for vendored marked.min.js. Promote the 'Later / fun' web-viewer item in docs/ideas/repo-wiki.md to 'shipped'. Quick pass on style.css for a clean, readable look (Tailwind-like minimal utilities or plain CSS).

Test:
- SKILL.md + references/web.md describe kb serve and the reference map links it
- assets/web/ has a PROVENANCE note for marked.min.js
notes:
2026-06-14 09:52 - Final CSS polish must realize the Clean-docs spec (see epic note): readable ~70ch measure, semantic staleness pills, sparing accent, dark mode.
2026-06-14 09:53 - Refinement: polish to 'minimal/neutral but crafted' — verify against the epic DESIGN TOKENS note: spacing rhythm, type scale, hairline borders, single subtle shadow, muted pills, a11y focus rings.
acceptance_criteria: kb serve is documented in SKILL.md + references/web.md; vendored assets have provenance; idea doc updated
